findings.summary: ModelProfile.capabilityTier still carries legacy LLM-grading vocabulary (15 rows)
findings.detail:
Distinct values seen:
  'advanced' (4 rows)
  'deep-thinker' (8 rows)
  'moderate' (3 rows)

Fix: Phase B of the routing migration retires this column. Rename to capabilityCategory (its actual purpose) and stop reading it as a routing tier.

findings.summary: 2 routing source file(s) still reference capabilityTier
findings.detail:
apps/web/lib/routing/known-provider-models.ts
  apps/web/lib/routing/recipe-types.ts

These should be audited: any read of capabilityTier as a routing input is the bug INV-6 names. Reads as admin-UI categorization are fine but should be tagged for the rename.

findings.summary: 1 subscription-style provider(s) report costModel='token' with $0 pricing — should be costModel='subscription'
findings.detail:
anthropic-sub: costModel=token input=0 output=0

Fix: spec §12.2 introduces costModel='subscription' with subscriptionWindowKind. Until that lands, the $0 token pricing means real spend (subscription quota) goes uncaptured in the cost ledger.
